serverUrlRequired: Enter your server address to get started.
serverNotSetUp: This server isn't set up yet. Set it up from a browser first, then come back here.
openIdRedirect: We'll open your login provider so you can log in.
openIdNoToken: We couldn't complete the login. Try again.
logOutMessage: Disconnect from this server? Your local data stays on this device, but you'll need to reconnect to sync.
noBudgetsDescription: Create your first budget to get started.
deleteBudgetSynced: "{{name}}" is synced with the server. Delete it from this device only, or from all devices?
deleteBudgetFromServer: Delete "{{name}}" from the server? Other devices will lose access to this budget.
reUploadConfirm: Upload "{{name}}" to the server? This will create a new copy on the server.
keepLocalConfirm: Disconnect "{{name}}" from the server? It won't sync anymore, but your data stays on this device.
detachedHint: Some budgets lost their server connection. Tap a budget to upload it again or keep it local only.
